source_meta.source_document: CORAIL Total Hip System and PINNACLE Acetabular Cup System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official product materials support the combined stem and acetabular platform with dedicated operative instrumentation.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe CORAIL as the HA-coated primary femoral stem family.
Official product materials describe PINNACLE as the core acetabular cup family.
Official product materials describe crosslinked polyethylene and related PINNACLE liner options.
DePuy hip portfolio materials pair the platform with modular femoral head options.

row.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the CORAIL femoral stem family with the PINNACLE acetabular cup system.
